author: catwith1hat
content: Rust needs to learn how to ship stable software and get away from "oh you need to run the nightly builds for this to work" as the default answer. Even https://github.com/rust-lang/portable-simd (required for AVX512 I presume) has `rustup update -- nightly` literally in the setup instructions. C (+inline assembler) is the only game in town for cryptography libs. Let's be honest.
